verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “A mantakin ci lehang, tuukulh kongah lutloin a mun dang panin kahin a lut mite pen a guta a buluh ahi hi
Ahi zongin tuukulh kong tawnin a lut mipa ahih leh a tuute a cingpa ahi hi
Tua ahih manin tuukong cingpa in a kong hon' a, a tuute a min ciatin a sap ciangin a tuute in a thu mang a, amah in tuukulh panin a tuute a pusuah khiatpih hi
A tuute khempeuh a pusuah khiat khit ciangin tuate mai-ah a cingpa pai a, a cingpa' aw thei uh ahih manin tuute in amah a zui uh hi
Tuute in midangte' nung zuilo uh hi; midangte' aw thei theilo uh ahih manin lau-in taisanzaw uh hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in hih thugentehna tawh thu a gen hangin amaute in Jesuh' gennop thu a theithei tuan kei uh hi.
Tua ahih manin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thu genkik leuleu a, “A mantakin ci lehang, kei pen tuute' paina kongpi ka hi hi
Keima hun ma-in a hong pai mite ahih leh guta buluhte ahih manun tuute in amaute donlo uh hi
Kei, kongpi ka hi hi. Keimah tawnin a pai tuu khempeuh in lauhuaina tuakkha loin, a ututun sungtumin pusuakin lonona mun a mu ding uh hi
Gutate pen a gu ding, a that ding, leh a siasak ding bekin hong pai hi. Kei ka hih leh tuute a nungta maimai bek hiloin nuntakna cingtaak a neihtheihna dingun a hong pai ka hi hi
“Kei, tuucing hoih ka hi hi. Tuucing hoih in a tuute sihpih ngam hi
Tuu nei taktak a hilo, a kicialtawm tuucingpa in ngia khawng a muh ciangin a tuute nusia-in taisan ahih manin ngia in tuute man a, tuute a kithehthang gawp hi
Amah a kicial tawm ahih manin a tuute khualna lungsim neiloin a taisan ahi hi
Kei, tuucing hoih ka hi hi. Pa in kei hong thei-in, kei zong Pa ka theih mah bangin keimah in ka tuute ka thei a, ka tuute in zong kei hong thei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ka tuute ka sihpih ngam hi
Hih tuukulh sungah a omlo tuu dang ka nei lai hi. Tuate zong tuukulh sungah ka khum ding a, amaute in keima thu ngai-in, keima khutsungah ka tuu omsate tawh honkhat suakkhawm ding uh hi
Ka nuntakkik theihna dingin si ngam ka hih manin ka Pa in kei hong it hi
Kuamah in ka nuntakna hong laksak theilo a, keima utthu tawh ka piak hizaw hi. Ka nuntakna piakkhiat theihna ding leh lakkik theihna ding thu ka Pa in kei tungah a hong piak ahi hi,” a ci hi
Hih bangin thu a gen ciangin Jew mihonte a ngaihsutna uh kituaklo leuleu hi
Mi tampi tak in, “Hihpa pen dawivei, mihai hi lel ahih manin a thugen ngaih taaklo hi,” ci uh a
pawlkhat in, “Dawiveite in hih bangin thu gen theilo hi. Dawi in mittawte khua musak thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
Jerusalem-ah Biakinn Apkikna Pawi bawl hun hong tung a, phalbi hunsung ahi hi
Biakinn huangsung Solomon' Talap a kici sungah Jesuh vak kawikawi-in a om laitakin
Jew mihonte ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh a, “Thu kitel loin bang tanvei koih hong sawm na hi hiam? Khrih na hih leh zong teltakin hong gen in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Jesuh in, “Hong genkhin napi ing-in Topa ka hihna thu na hong um kei uh hi. Ka Pa' thu tawh na ka septe in hong kilangsak khinzo hi
Ahi zongin note pen keima tuu hilo na hih manun Khrih ka hihlam na hong um kei uh hi
Keima tuute in ka aw za-in thei uh ahih manin kei hong zui uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute tungah nuntak tawntungna pia ka hih manin si ngei nawnlo ding uh a, keima khutsung panin kuamah in amaute hong sut zolo ding uh hi
Ka khutsungah a hong pia ka Pa sangin a lianzaw kuamah omlo ahih manin ka Pa' khutsung panin kuamah in lakhia zolo ding hi
Kei leh ka Pa pumkhat ka hi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Jew mihonte in amah deng dingin suang tawm leuleu uh ahih manin
Jesuh in, “Ka Pa' hong sawl bangin note' muhna-ah na hoih tampi ka hong sepna hangin suang tawh den' hong sawm na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin
mihonte in, “Nasep hoih na sep manin hong dengnuam ka hi kei uh a, Pasian na simmawhbawl manin hong dengnuam ka hi uh hi. Nang pen mi hi lel hinapi-in Pasian na kineihnuam hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na Thukham sung uhah Pasian in, ‘Note pen pasiante na hi uh hi,’ ci hi
Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thute a tawntungin a thuman hi a, Pasian' thu a ngah mite pen Pasian in, ‘pasian-te,’ na ci hi
Tua ahih manin kei pen Pa Pasian in hong teelin leitungah a hong sawl ka hih manin, ‘Pasian' Tapa ka hi hi,’ ka cih ciangin bang hangin Pasian simmawhbawl hong cithei na hi uh hiam
Ka Pa' na a semlo hi leng na hong uploh mah ding uh ahi hi
Ahi zongin keimah in ka Pa' na sem ka hih manin keima thu na hong um nuamlo uh ahi ta zongin, Pa tawh pumkhat ka hihna thu na theihna dingun ka nasepnate na up dingun kilawm buang hi,” a ci leuleu hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuh matsawm uh hi; ahi zongin amaute' khutsung panin Jesuh a suakta hi
Tua ciangin Jordan Gun kantanin amah pai leuleu a, Johan in mite a tuiphum masakna munah tungin tua lai-ah a om hi
Ama kiangah mi tampi tak hong kikhawm uh a, “Johan in na lamdang bangmah bawllo hi. Ahi zongin Johan in hih mipa thu a gen khempeuh a vekpi-in mankim hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin tua lai-ah mi tampi in Jesuh a um uh hi.
